sqlReaderQuery.value:
WITH db2_data AS (
    select SUBJ_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD
    from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC
    where CYC_STTUS_CD = 'RUNNING'
       and SUBJ_CD = '@{variables('Subject')}'
       and TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{variables('Target')}'
    UNION
    select SUBJ_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD
    from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC
    where CYC_STTUS_CD = 'RUNNING'
       and SUBJ_CD = '@{variables('Subject')}'
       and SRC_SYS_CD <> '@{variables('Source')}'
       and TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{variables('Target')}'
    UNION
    select SUBJ_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD
    from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC
    where CYC_STTUS_CD = 'RUNNING'
       and SUBJ_CD = '@{variables('Subject')}'
       and SRC_SYS_CD = '@{variables('Source')}'
),
transformed_data AS (
    SELECT SUBJ_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD
    FROM db2_data
)
SELECT COUNT(*) as link_count FROM transformed_data

parameters.subject: BCAFEP Medical Claim Member Recycle Abort due to another Claims processing
parameters.body:
The South Carolina Medical Claim Member Recycle processing can not run while IDS claim is being updated or extracted from.

Source = 'BCA'
Target = 'IDS'
Subject = 'CLAIM'

subject.value: @concat('BCBSKC Recycled BCA FEP Med Claims File ', variables('RunCycleDate'))

parameters.body:
BCBSKC has recycled theBCA FEP Med Claims file for this Month but there were members on the file not found on our Warehouse. The unmatched Members file is placed in the below folder.

O:\\library\\FEP\\PHI09\\Shared\\FEPDSM
